records.ety: [L. lustratus, p. p. of lustrare to lustrate, fr. lustrum. See Lustrum.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Lustrated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Lustrating (?).]

defs: To make clear or pure by means of a propitiatory offering; to purify.
quotes: We must purge, and cleanse, and lustrate the whole city.
